mapper.select: SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE r.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} ORDER BY r.review_idx DESC

SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE r.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} ORDER BY r.review_idx DESC

SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, r.buyer_idx AS reviewerMemIdx, COALESCE(mp.mem_nickname, m.mem_id) AS reviewerNickname FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN member m ON r.buyer_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx WHERE r.bidder_idx = #{memIdx} AND r.review_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY r.review_regdate DESC

SELECT a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx LEFT JOIN review r ON b.bid_idx = r.bid_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND bs.bid_status_code = 'won' AND r.bid_idx IS NULL ORDER BY b.bid_idx DESC

SELECT a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, b.bidder_idx AS bidderIdx FROM bid b JOIN auction a ON b.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN bid_status bs ON b.bid_status_idx = bs.bid_status_idx LEFT JOIN review r ON b.bid_idx = r.bid_idx WHERE a.buyer_idx = #{buyerIdx} AND bs.bid_status_code = 'won' AND r.bid_idx IS NULL
AND a.auction_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND i.item_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review ( buyer_idx, bid_idx, auction_idx, bidder_idx, review_title, review_star, review_content, review_regdate ) SELECT a.buyer_idx, b.bid_idx, a.auction_idx, b.bidder_idx, #{reviewTitle}, #{reviewStar}, #{content}, NOW() FROM auction a JOIN bid b ON a.auction_idx = b.auction_idx WHERE b.bid_idx = #{bidIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, r.bidder_idx AS profileMemIdx, r.buyer_idx AS reviewerMemIdx, r.review_title AS reviewTitle, r.review_content AS reviewContent, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate, r.auction_idx AS auctionIdx, r.bid_idx AS bidIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, b.bid_regdate AS tradeDate, COALESCE(reviewerProfile.mem_nickname, reviewer.mem_id) AS reviewerNickname, reviewerGrade.grade_name AS reviewerGradeName, COALESCE(profileOwnerProfile.mem_nickname, profileOwner.mem_id) AS profileNickname, profileOwnerGrade.grade_name AS profileGradeName FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx JOIN member reviewer ON r.buyer_idx = reviewer.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile reviewerProfile ON reviewer.mem_idx = reviewerProfile.mem_idx LEFT JOIN grade reviewerGrade ON reviewer.mem_grade_idx = reviewerGrade.grade_idx JOIN member profileOwner ON r.bidder_idx = profileOwner.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile profileOwnerProfile ON profileOwner.mem_idx = profileOwnerProfile.mem_idx LEFT JOIN grade profileOwnerGrade ON profileOwner.mem_grade_idx = profileOwnerGrade.grade_idx WHERE r.review_idx = #{reviewIdx} AND r.review_is_deleted = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE review SET review_is_deleted = 'Y', review_deldate = NOW() WHERE review_idx = #{reviewIdx}
mapper.select: SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE r.review_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY r.review_idx DESC

SELECT r.review_idx AS reviewIdx, a.auction_title AS auctionTitle, i.item_name AS itemName, r.review_star AS reviewStar, r.review_regdate AS reviewRegdate FROM review r JOIN auction a ON r.auction_idx = a.auction_idx JOIN bid b ON r.bid_idx = b.bid_idx LEFT JOIN item i ON b.item_idx = i.item_idx WHERE r.review_is_deleted = 'Y' ORDER BY r.review_idx DESC
